title: Blue Birthday Cake Themed Soft Plush Pet Toy Squeaker Crinkle Effect Dog Puppy Stimulating Interactive Play
features: Perfect for Playtime Celebrations: This squeaky birthday plush cake dog toy is an excellent way to make your dog feel special during playtime. Its festive design adds an extra layer of excitement, making it an ideal choice for birthdays, special occasions, or simply as a fun treat for your beloved pet.

Engaging Sounds and Textures to Keep Dogs Entertained: Equipped with an internal squeaker and crinkle material, this toy offers a delightful combination of sounds and textures that will captivate your dog’s curiosity and encourage interactive play. The variety of sensory stimulation helps to keep your dog engaged and entertained for hours.

Soft, Safe, and Durable Construction: Made from high-quality polyester, this toy is soft enough to be gentle on your pet’s teeth and gums, while its durable build ensures it can withstand energetic play sessions. Whether your dog loves to chew, tug, or snuggle, this toy is designed to last.

Ideal Size for All Breeds and Ages: Measuring 22cm x 12cm, this plush cake toy is a versatile size, making it easy for dogs of all sizes and ages to carry, toss, and play with. It’s lightweight yet substantial enough to provide an enjoyable and interactive experience for your furry friend.

Charming and Festive Color Options: Available in three delightful colours—pink, blue, and beige—this birthday-themed toy brings a cheerful and stylish touch to your pet’s collection. Its playful design not only makes it an appealing toy for your dog but also a cute accessory that complements the festive spirit of any special occasion.
description: Product Description Birthday Cake Toy This squeaky birthday plush cake dog toy is an excellent way to make your dog feel special during playtime. Its festive design adds an extra layer of excitement, making it an ideal choice for birthdays, special occasions, or simply as a fun treat for your beloved pet. Measuring 22cm x 12cm, this plush cake toy is a versatile size, making it easy for dogs of all sizes and ages to carry, toss, and play with. It’s lightweight yet substantial enough to provide an enjoyable and interactive experience for your furry friend. Available in three delightful colours—pink, blue, and beige—this birthday-themed toy brings a cheerful and stylish touch to your pet’s collection. Its playful design not only makes it an appealing toy for your dog but also a cute accessory that complements the festive spirit of any special occasion. Additionally, there’s a hidden vinyl dog toy inside the plush present, offering a fun surprise for your pet to discover while they play, encouraging curiosity and interactive play sessions.
